task: Show crazy credits for the movie " Prometheus" on IMDb.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to IMDb, opened the Prometheus (2012) title page, then clicked through to the dedicated Crazy credits page at https://www.imdb.com/title/tt1446714/crazycredits/?tab=cz&ref_=tt_dyk_cc. The final snapshot clearly shows the full crazy credits entries on that page, and the agent’s final response accurately reports all four entries exactly as shown. This satisfies the task to show crazy credits for Prometheus on IMDb.
final_result_response:
Prometheus (2012) IMDb Crazy credits:

1. There is a statement at the end of the closing credits: "Previous Footage Property of Weyland Corp. Building Better Worlds Since 10.11.12. weylandindustries.com/timeline"

2. The opening title appears in the piece-by-piece fashion of the original Alien (1979) movie.

3. The opening credits take place throughout the Engineers' scene on Earth.

4. The 20th Century Fox, Dune Entertainment and Scott Free Production logos are shaded ice blue.
action_history: Opening IMDb: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.imdb.com/');
Opening Prometheus title page: await page.locator('e200').click();
